reference: Hi. Please answer the following questions for more information. Is there any recent stress, either mental or physical? Are hairs falling from the whole scalp, or is there sparing of any area, like only in the occipital area? Please send photographs of your scalp. Are you on any medication?
text: Hi, please answer the following questions for more information. Is there any recent stress, either mental or physical? Are hairs falling from the whole scalp? Or is there sparing of any area, like only in the occipital area? Please send photographs of your scalp. Are you on any medication?
